description_long: This doll features a humanoid figure with a highly stylized, almost mechanical appearance. Its head is large and expressive, with exaggerated facial features including wide, round eyes, a curled mustache, and a painted mouth, giving it a slightly whimsical yet eerie look. The torso is dressed in a red and black jacket with a white shirt underneath, while the arms and legs are segmented and appear to be constructed from metallic or jointed components, resembling a marionette or animatronic figure. The hands are detailed with articulated fingers, and the legs end in large, black boots. The overall design combines elements of Victorian fashion with a steampunk or automaton aesthetic. The surface of the doll is a mix of painted fabric and metallic textures, with visible joints and mechanical details.
description: A humanoid doll with a mechanical, steampunk-inspired design, featuring a red jacket, segmented limbs, and a large expressive face with a curled mustache.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, red jacket, articulated arms, and large black boots.
description_view_1: Side profile, revealing the thinness of the doll and the layered, jointed construction of its limbs.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view, highlighting the back of the jacket, mechanical joints, and the overall segmented structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the slimness and mechanical articulation of the limbs.
attribute_clothing_style: Victorian-inspired red and black jacket with a white shirt, featuring metallic and mechanical elements reminiscent of steampunk fashion.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent at the elbows, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide-eyed with raised eyebrows, a curled mustache, and a slightly open mouth, giving a surprised or whimsical expression.
attribute_hair_style: Short brown hair parted in the middle with curled ends and two small pigtails on each side.
